sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتِ الإِدَارَةُ تَنْظِيمَ يَوْمٍ لِلقِرَاءَةِ فِي المَدْرَسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Uprava je odlučila organizovati dan čitanja u školi.
sentences.translationEn: The administration decided to organize a reading day at school.

sentences.arabic: أَحْضَرَ كُلُّ طَالِبٍ كِتَابَهُ المُفَضَّلَ مِنَ البَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Svaki učenik je donio svoju omiljenu knjigu od kuće.
sentences.translationEn: Each student brought their favorite book from home.

sentences.translation: Sjeli su u bašti i tiho čitali.
sentences.translationEn: They sat in the garden and read quietly.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ القِرَاءَةِ تَحَدَّثَ كُلُّ طَالِبٍ عَنْ كِتَابِهِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon čitanja svaki učenik je pričao o svojoj knjizi.
sentences.translationEn: After reading, each student talked about their book.

sentences.translation: Bio je to zabavan dan koji su svi voljeli.
sentences.translationEn: It was a fun day that everyone loved.
